input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.10 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.10
            TITLE: skidpad event

            CONTENT:
            rule D.10: SKIDPAD EVENT
D.10 SKIDPAD EVENT 
The Skidpad event measures the vehicle cornering ability on a flat surface while making a 
constant radius turn.

final_answer: The Skidpad event measures the vehicle cornering ability on a flat surface while making a constant radius turn.
